metadata.title: Turning a Surprise Mid Push Into a Clean 2v1 Double Kill in VALORANT
metadata.description:
Caught these two off guard with a quick move and calm aim. Sometimes the best plays come from unexpected angles. What’s your favorite spot to catch enemies by surprise?

Share your best surprise angle plays in the comments!

#shorts #valorant #gaming #fps #valorantclips
